---
title: test
format: html
---

```{r}
#| echo: false

pacman::p_load(knitr, digest, stargazer, sjPlot, codebook, summarytools, dplyr, tidyr,
 tidyLPA, lme4, ggplot2, ggeffects, skimr, table1, patchwork, here, kableExtra, ggthemes, tidyverse,
 ggbreak, texreg, coefplot, plotly, modelsummary)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
load("input/data/original/casen_2022.RData")
```


```{r}
proc_casen22 <- casen_2022 %>% 
  select(sexo, pco2, activ, folio, nucleo, edad)

saveRDS(proc_casen22, 
  here("input", "data", "proc", "proc_casen22.rds"), compress = FALSE)
```
